content.rendered:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”50px” el_class=”height30″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”flexrow”][vc_column width=”1/4″ el_class=”flextwo gt-custom-sidebar-column”][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”honeymoon-package-international-sidebar”][/vc_column][vc_column width=”3/4″ el_class=”second-div-text flexone”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

After the hectic rush of the wedding and multiple functions related to the event, newlyweds look forward to their honeymoon to spend some quiet time together. If Malaysia is on your mind, we can plan a fantastic Malaysia trip package for couples to include gorgeous locations and help you create memories for a lifetime.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Is Malaysia a Popular Destination for a Honeymoon?” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Malaysia offers an excellent mix of modern architecture, natural landscapes, fantastic food, and exotic culture, making it a big hit for couples who need to enjoy their alone time. It is a pocket-friendly holiday destination yet offers plenty of incredible places and adventures. You could laze around the beaches of Langkawi, enjoy watersports on Pangkor Island, stay on a traditional houseboat on Lake Kenyir, or sample some of the country’s best street food dishes. At ATW Travels, we offer a range of Malaysia honeymoon packages that cover your travel and accommodation requirements, leaving you completely stress-free. This country has everything you’ll ever need to make your romantic vacation special.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image=”26319″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What are the Different Romantic Places in Malaysia?” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

We offer a wide range of affordable Malaysia honeymoon packages for tight on time and budget couples. Our long-standing relationship with industry veterans, rental service companies, hotels, and facilities management companies helps us deliver a world-class travel experience at budget prices. Irrespective of the package chosen, we’ll ensure that your itinerary includes Malaysia’s best. Some of the destinations included in our packages are:

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Langkawi” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Langkawi is an archipelago of 104 islands and the only UNESCO geo-park listed in Southeast Asia. It has some fantastic beaches, extraordinary wildlife, and lively nightlife. Some of the famous attractions on the island include Langkawi Cable Car, Sky Bridge, Kilim Karst Geoforest Park, and Underwater Langkawi. And if you’re an adrenaline junkie, there are plenty of watersport activities like parasailing, jet skiing, kayaking, banana boating, and canoeing.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image=”26320″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Pangkor Laut Island” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Pangkor is a small Chinatown popular for its traditional lifestyle and multiple beaches. You can catch a cultural show depicting ancient Chinese traditions and later enjoy the famous street food of Pangkor Island. Couples can visit the Sunset View Chalet every evening for some bird-watching.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Cameron Highlands” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

As the name suggests, Cameron Highlands is located 2000 metres above sea level. The highland retreat has a beautiful landscape of tea plantations on its hilly slopes. Our Malaysia honeymoon packages for couples include tea-tasting, a visit to strawberry farms and jungle trails, Cameron Butterfly Park, and Parit Waterfalls.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner full_width=”stretch_row_content_no_spaces” css=”.vc_custom_1645675083319{margin-bottom: 20px !important;padding-top: 40px !important;padding-bottom: 40px !important;background-color: #1a2b48 !important;}” el_id=”mobileshoecontact” el_class=”show-mobile”][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1646219711622{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

Stay Connected

[/vc_column_text][vc_icon icon_fontawesome=”fas fa-phone” background_style=”rounded” size=”xs” align=”center” el_class=”gthomeicon” css=”.vc_custom_1643786099141{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”][vc_column_text]

+91 9693339999

[/vc_column_text][vc_separator el_width=”30″][vc_icon icon_fontawesome=”fas fa-envelope” background_style=”rounded” size=”xs” align=”center” el_class=”gthomeicon” css=”.vc_custom_1643786244533{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”][vc_column_text]

info@atwtravels.com

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1644654313324{border-left-width: 1px !important;border-left-color: #ffffff !important;border-left-style: solid !important;}”][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1653552970249{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

Book Your Dream Vacay Today!

[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Kota Kinabalu” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

This is the capital city of Sabah and is known for its rural and traditional lifestyle. Travellers worldwide visit Mount Kinabalu, one of Malaysia’s tallest mountains, to witness the amazing sunrise and marvel at the different plants and animals in the Kinabalu Park. Besides visiting attractions like museums and craft markets, couples can also take a wetland cruise from Kilas Wetland Mangrove Forest Reserve.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Sabah” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Sabah is located on the northern point of Borneo Island and is a popular honeymoon destination because of its beautiful beaches and fantastic wildlife. Sabah’s biodiversity and rugged landscape make it a perfect destination for nature lovers. It is also the best place to experience the lifestyle and culture of different ethnic groups living in the rainforests of Borneo.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image=”26321″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Taman Negara” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

The Taman Negara National Park is 130 million years and the oldest rainforest. Couples can walk on the world’s longest canopy walk on a walkway 40 metres above land. They can also indulge in a wide range of activities, including trekking along Gunung Tahan, hiking to Bukit Teresek, and exploring the different caves of Taman Negara. Remember to check the activities offered when choosing Malaysian honeymoon packages for couples.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Kuala Lampur” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Visiting Kuala Lampur is a must for honeymooners when travelling to Malaysia. Petronas Towers offers fantastic sunset views along with the city’s beautiful skyline. Visits to Batu Caves and Thean House Temple are part of our Malaysian honeymoon package. You can also experience Kuala Lampur’s vibrant nightlife and its yummy street food.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image=”26318″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”When is the Best Time to Visit Malaysia?” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Malaysia is abuzz with tourists throughout the year. However, the best Malaysia honeymoon tour packages are available from November to April when the weather is pleasant, and the average temperature ranges between 22-degree Celsius to 33-degree Celsius. It is also when numerous festivals like the Chinese New Year and Thaipusam are celebrated. But suppose you are looking for low-cost Malaysia honeymoon packages. In that case, we suggest visiting the country between March and June as it rains heavily during this time, and most beaches are closed or inoperable.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Is a Malaysia Honeymoon Expensive?” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Malaysia is a pocket-friendly honeymoon destination, provided you choose a reputable travel partner. At ATW Travels, we’ve made it our mission to make travel affordable for everyone. Our Malaysia honeymoon packages include all significant destinations and activities, yet don’t burn a hole in your pocket.

Get in touch with us at ATW Travels to avail the best Malaysia honeymoon tour packages.

Follow us on Instagram and learn about our latest and the best deals or reach out to us at 9693339999 to chart out your travel plans.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”show-mobile contact_bg modifiedcontact”][vc_column][vc_column_text]Get the Guaranteed Best Vacation Deals from ATW Travels[/vc_column_text]
